description_long: This object is a classic Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) video game console, featuring a rectangular, two-tone gray plastic body with black accents and a front-loading cartridge slot. The front panel displays the 'Nintendo Entertainment System' branding in red, along with two controller ports and power/reset buttons. A wired rectangular controller with a simple D-pad and red buttons is attached, reflecting the iconic design of 1980s gaming hardware. The rear side includes various AV and power input ports, as well as ventilation grilles for cooling. The top surface is flat with additional vent slots, and the overall build is robust, designed for tabletop use. The object is compact and portable, with a hard plastic exterior and visible seams where the panels meet.
description: A classic Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) console with a two-tone gray plastic body, front cartridge slot, and a wired rectangular controller. Features include power/reset buttons, controller ports, and rear AV/power connections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the NES branding, cartridge slot, controller ports, and attached controller.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting AV and power ports, ventilation grilles, and the back of the controller.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid gray panel, cable routing, and the console's compact profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the controller and the top vent slots.
